title: pteris crispa
intro: Pteris crispa, also known as the curly fern or fishbone fern, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris crispa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pteris crispa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
